name: Corn Bread Taco Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole kernel corn, drained (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain.
2. Stir in the taco seasoning, water, corn, green pepper, tomato sauce, corn muffin mix, and half of the French fried onions.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8x12 inch baking dish.
4. Prepare the remaining corn muffin mix according to package directions, adding the other half of the French fried onions.
5. Spoon the prepared corn muffin mix around the outer edge of the casserole.
6. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 20 minutes.
7. Top with the remaining onions and cheese.
8. Bake for an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
